notes: PRE-FLIGHT Linter — desk-side pre-pull / pre-stack plan check run BEFORE the irreversible floor act (pull / dress / stack). Engine preflight_run(force): pure derivation from already-parsed EDP slots (edpParsed.racks[].slots uStart/uEnd) + Master cables (racksByCab cablesOut, or the flat cables[] when in-memory) — ZERO new field entry. Chunked yield (every 40 racks / 2000 cables) + cached in phantom_preflight_v1 keyed {deploymentId|masterHash|edpHash}, recomputed only on source change or explicit RUN. HARD NO-GO (badge-red): U-COLLISION (a U claimed by >1 EDP slot), CHASSIS-WON'T-FIT (slot span exceeds rack totalU), DOUBLE-BOOKED PORT (one normalized dns|port mapped to >1 distinct far-end). ADVISORY (badge-gold, NEVER blocks the gate): OPTIC MISMATCH (_rec_norm(aOptic)!=zOptic) + SPEED MISMATCH (token diff) — demoted to advisory to protect tech trust in the NO-GO badge. EXCEPTION: blank-U slots (uStart<1) surfaced as 'needs-U', never audited (the EDP parser defaults a blank U cell to 0). Bound STRICTLY to edpParsed slots, NOT the master inferred-height elevation path (master_rackToElevation/master_nodeHeightU regex-guesses → would emit false collisions). UI: a '✈ PRE-FLIGHT' panel mounts atop BUILD -> AUDITS (AUDIT.renderList) as a SIBLING above '▣ DOCUMENT RECONCILE' — kpi-row (NO-GO / Advisory / Needs-U) + finding cards + RUN button (skeleton-grid progress), cyan accent, all existing tokens, NO new CSS (respects the zero-horizontal-overflow rule). Pipe: one-tap '↳ LOG DISCREPANCY' writes a category 'fiber' (cable) | 'rack' (geometry) record to phantom_discrepancies_v1 + a DISCREPANCY_LOGGED audit event — which rolls into the shift report. Mirrors the reconcile_run/_render/_logDiscrepancy contract verbatim. Built directly in Claude Code on top of v1.6.85 — sync web-Claude's sandbox before the next app handback. node --check clean (block validated in isolation); three stamps at v1.6.86 (PHANTOM_APP_VERSION, sw.js CACHE_VERSION, version.json).
